◎简　　介  

　　Army doctor Eva Marini desires to join a regiment to secure equal appropriate rights for ladies. So her commanding officer (Mario Carotenuto) sends her off to a boot camp led by Renzo Montagnani, where just the numerous unruly troops end up (something similar to “The Hill”, except here all the offenders are gender obsessed). In the ferry the girl documents and wallet are taken ...
